description: Phase 8 - Performance: Create performance infrastructure utilities. Includes API performance instrumentation, pagination utility, request deduplication hook, image lazy loading utility, bundle size budget config, and performance monitoring hook.
steps: Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/apiPerformanceInstrumentation.ts - Utility for request timing and slow query detection. Include: RequestTimer class (start/end/duration), SlowQueryDetector (configurable threshold, default 2000ms), RequestMetricsCollector (tracks p50/p95/p99 across requests), formatMetricsSummary(). Store metrics in memory with optional localStorage persistence.

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/paginationUtils.ts - Pagination utility ensuring all list endpoints use cursor/offset pagination. Include types: PaginationParams, CursorPaginationParams, OffsetPaginationParams, PaginatedResponse<T>. Functions: buildPaginationParams(page, pageSize), buildCursorParams(cursor, limit), parsePaginationHeaders(headers), getNextPageParams(currentResponse), calculateTotalPages(total, pageSize).

Create artifacts/edms/src/hooks/useRequestDeduplication.ts - React hook that prevents duplicate API calls. Maintains in-flight request map keyed by URL+params hash. If same request is already in-flight, returns the existing promise instead of making a new call. Include cleanup on unmount. Exports useRequestDeduplication() hook and standalone deduplicateRequest() function.

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/imageLazyLoading.ts - Utility for image/thumbnail lazy loading. Include: LazyImageConfig type, createIntersectionObserver(options), buildSrcSet(baseUrl, sizes), generatePlaceholderDataUrl(width, height, color), calculateLoadPriority(viewport, elementRect). Uses IntersectionObserver API pattern.

Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/bundleSizeBudget.ts - Bundle size budget configuration. Define BundleBudget interface with limits per chunk. Include budgets: main chunk (200KB gzip), vendor chunk (400KB gzip), lazy routes (50KB each). Functions: checkBudget(actualSize, budget), formatBudgetReport(results). Export DEFAULT_BUDGETS constant.

Create artifacts/edms/src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor.ts - React hook that tracks component render times. Uses Performance API (performance.mark/measure). Tracks: mount time, re-render count, average render duration, slow renders (>16ms). Exports usePerformanceMonitor(componentName) returning metrics object.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/apiPerformanceInstrumentation.test.ts - Tests for request timing, slow query detection, and metrics collection.
Create artifacts/edms/src/lib/paginationUtils.test.ts - Tests for all pagination functions and edge cases.
Create artifacts/edms/src/hooks/useRequestDeduplication.test.ts - Tests for deduplication logic using renderHook.
Create artifacts/edms/src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor.test.ts - Tests for performance monitoring hook.
acceptance_criteria: All new test files pass when running cd artifacts/edms && npx vitest run
useRequestDeduplication correctly deduplicates concurrent identical requests
usePerformanceMonitor tracks render timing using Performance API
paginationUtils supports both cursor and offset pagination modes
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/LDO-2-local/artifacts/edms && npx vitest run src/lib/apiPerformanceInstrumentation.test.ts src/lib/paginationUtils.test.ts src/hooks/useRequestDeduplication.test.ts src/hooks/usePerformanceMonitor.test.ts
